steps.text: Identify the client’s goals and posture as disclosing party for this NDA clause and list key protection priorities
Analyze risks in the disclosure-to-affiliates/agents/advisors sentence from disclosing party perspective
Analyze risks in the perpetual term / no-expiration sentence from disclosing party perspective
Draft concrete redlined clause language addressing each identified risk, with [CONFIRM WITH CLIENT] where business input is needed
Run a quick consistency and risk checklist, then present a concise issue-spotting summary with suggested redlines and attorney-review disclaimer
